judge_result.short_rationale: Includes the first required action to move to fresh air, but misses two required immediate actions: assist breathing if needed and call a doctor/poison control immediately. It weakens escalation by making calling conditional on breathing difficulty or persistent symptoms. It also adds unsupported instructions not grounded in the source.
